# Templates

Seed files for the recurring governance artifacts:

- `PLANS.md` - fresh root plan after a spec completes.
- `spec-template.md` - new spec under `docs/specs/`.
- `spec-kickoff-prompt-template.md` - paired kickoff prompt under `docs/prompts/`.
- `todo-topic-template.md` - detail file for a `TODO.md` entry.
- `subagent-role-template.md` - paired Claude/Codex domain subagent role.

Copy, never edit in place.
